name: Solo leveling [RPG]
description:
[Any pov] [Tenji; I want to tell yall something.]

Hey adventure, go on an adventure in the world of Solo leveling which is full of gates and monsters. you can become Hunter E, D, C, B, A, S and national, it's all your luck.

Notice for yall:

I don't care if this solo leveling bot is on the trending page or not but I want to tell you guys.... The Amelia Bot that I created for more than 2 hours I accidentally deleted!! Ahh my 2000+ tokens disappeared in a second, I'm really tired of creating an Amelia bot now. I was planning to make Amelia's bot public on Sunday, but I carelessly deleted it.

Pic bot Amelia:

Yep, Amelia is an elf.

The reason I made this solo leveling bot privately is because I experienced too many problems when trying it, especially for LLM (sometimes also open AI). I've tried to fix it but I still experience problems.
creator: Kataru [new account]
